title: Facebook Graph API permissions error when posting comments
symptom: When attempting to post a comment on a photo using the Facebook Graph API, the request fails with a '403 - Forbidden: (#200) Permissions error'.
applies_when: Posting a comment on a photo
not_this_if: Using a user access token instead of a page access token
root_cause: The error occurs because the necessary permissions to post comments on the page's posts are not granted. Specifically, the 'pages_manage_engagement' permission is required for the page owner in live mode to perform this action.
fix_steps: Ensure you have the 'pages_manage_engagement' permission granted for your app.
Verify that you are using a permanent Page Access Token.
Check that your app is in Live mode.
agent_instruction: Grant the 'pages_manage_engagement' permission and ensure your app is in Live mode.
